image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about photolithography chips than social media does.
Context visual: Photolithography chips are the backbone of modern electronics, etching intricate patterns onto silicon wafers.
Escalation visual: This process allows billions of tiny transistors to fit in a tiny space, making devices smaller and faster.
Evidence visual: Scientists are constantly pushing the limits, exploring new materials and techniques to improve efficiency.
Payoff visual: Understanding photolithography is key to grasping how our world is digitized and interconnected.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into tech? Follow for more insights!
